metadata.title: I-dont-know
metadata.description: AI-generated deck about I don't know in Spanish

sentences.original: Lo siento, no lo sé.
sentences.translation: I'm sorry, I don't know.

sentences.original: No lo sé ahora.
sentences.translation: I don't know now.

sentences.original: No sé la respuesta.
sentences.translation: I don't know the answer.

sentences.original: No sé dónde está el baño.
sentences.translation: I don't know where the bathroom is.

sentences.original: No tengo idea de qué hora es.
sentences.translation: I have no idea what time it is.

sentences.original: No tengo idea de eso.
sentences.translation: I have no idea about that.

sentences.original: ¿Cuándo llega el tren? Ni idea.
sentences.translation: When does the train arrive? No idea.

sentences.original: Ni idea de cómo usar esto.
sentences.translation: No idea how to use this.

sentences.original: No estoy seguro de la fecha.
sentences.translation: I am not sure about the date.

sentences.original: No estoy seguro todavía.
sentences.translation: I am not sure yet.

sentences.original: ¿Qué pasará mañana? ¿Quién sabe?
sentences.translation: What will happen tomorrow? Who knows?

sentences.original: ¿Quién sabe dónde viven?
sentences.translation: Who knows where they live?

sentences.original: No sé nada sobre el examen.
sentences.translation: I don't know anything about the exam.

sentences.original: Ella dice que no sabe nada.
sentences.translation: She says she doesn't know anything.

sentences.original: Todavía no lo sé con certeza.
sentences.translation: I don't know for sure yet.

sentences.original: Te aviso, pero todavía no lo sé.
sentences.translation: I'll let you know, but I don't know yet.

cards.translation: I don't know what to say

sentences.original: Es una sorpresa, no sé qué decir.
sentences.translation: It's a surprise, I don't know what to say.

sentences.original: No sé qué decir ante tu pregunta.
sentences.translation: I don't know what to say to your question.

sentences.original: No lo sé exactamente, pero creo que sí.
sentences.translation: I don't know exactly, but I think so.

sentences.original: No lo sé exactamente en este momento.
sentences.translation: I don't know exactly at this moment.
